title: Customer interview — Ferns & Co
text:
# Interview: Ferns & Co (SMB)
Date: 2026-05-25
Interviewer: UX Research

Q: What's your biggest frustration?
A: Honestly, Reporting & Export. It slows the whole team down and there's no 'Slack integration'.

Q: If we fixed one thing?
A: Give us 'Slack integration'. We'd expand our seat count if you did.

Q: How does this compare to alternatives?
A: A competitor already offers this, which is why we're evaluating switching.
